landing.hero_subtitle: Research & Community for People with Ankylosing Spondylitis
landing.hero_description: An open platform connecting scientific research and personal exchange for people with axial spondyloarthritis (axSpA).
landing.mission_text: SpondylAtlas makes current research on Ankylosing Spondylitis accessible and provides a platform for sharing experiences and knowledge within the community.
landing.feature_research_desc: Current scientific papers, summarized in plain language.
landing.feature_forum_desc: Connect with other patients and experts.
landing.feature_open_desc: Transparent, community-driven, and accessible to all.
